subject: [PATCH v10 09/15] userfaultfd: add UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP and UFFDIO_RWPROTECT plumbing

2026-07-08.patch_summary: This patch adds a new feature to the Linux kernel's userfaultfd system, allowing userspace to track read-write protection (RWP) on memory ranges. It introduces two new ioctls: UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP and UFFDIO_RWPROTECT, which enable RWP tracking and allow installing or removing RWP on a range. The feature is gated by CONFIG_USERFAULTFD_RWP, which is automatically selected for 64-bit kernels with certain architecture features. The patch also includes documentation updates and changes to the userfaultfd code.
